blink-respawn-2026.name: BLINK RESPAWN 2026
blink-respawn-2026.location: Sambil, Av. John F. Kennedy, Santo Domingo 10413, Dominican Republic
blink-respawn-2026.description:
Blink Respawn 2026 returns to the Dominican Republic as the Caribbean's premier esports and fighting game festival. Scheduled for June 5 through June 7, 2026, the event will take place at Sambil Santo Domingo, bringing together competitors, creators, and gaming communities from across LATAM, North America, and beyond.

As a major international destination, the 2026 tournament features a high-stakes lineup on an epic stage. The main event is headlined by a massive open bracket for Street Fighter 6, which proudly serves as an official Capcom Pro Tour Offline Premier Event, ensuring world-class talent will be in attendance to fight for the trophy.

Premier Tournament Lineup

Beyond Street Fighter 6, the competitive roster includes heavy-hitting staples and modern favorites. Attendees will clash in Super Smash Bros. Ultimate, Riot's tag-team fighter 2XKO, and SNK's latest acclaimed release, Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves, which is featured as an SWC 2026 Official Tournament.

More Than a Tournament

Blink Respawn is designed to be a full destination experience fueled by energy, culture, and real competition. Attendees can take a break from the brackets to enjoy casual play zones, trading card game tournaments, free-play tables, and live community moments alongside top content creators.

Registration

Registration and bracket sign-ups are managed through Start.gg and the official Blink Respawn website. Competitors can secure their spots in the tournament until late registration closes on May 30, 2026. General admission passes are available online or at the venue for spectators wishing to experience the live commentators, the official Blink Respawn store, and the electrifying main stage.

hessen-crash-xxiii.name: Hessen Crash XXIII
hessen-crash-xxiii.location: Louisenstraße 58, 61348 Bad Homburg vor der Höhe, Germany
hessen-crash-xxiii.description:
Hessen Crash XXIII returns as Germany's longest-running fighting game community event, bringing the European scene together since 2010. Scheduled for June 5 through June 7, 2026, the event will take place inside the historic Kurhaus Bad Homburg, welcoming competitors of all skill levels.

As a cornerstone of the European fighting game community, the 2026 tournament features a highly competitive main lineup. The brackets will be headlined by massive showdowns in Street Fighter 6, Tekken 8, and Riot's tag-team fighter 2XKO, drawing top regional talent to battle for the championship titles.

Premier Tournaments and SWC Qualifiers

Beyond the core lineup, attendees will clash in Arc System Works favorites like Guilty Gear Strive and Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising. The event also proudly hosts an official SWC Qualifier for SNK's Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves, adding international stakes to the weekend's competition.

Community and Side Brackets

Hessen Crash is celebrated for its dedication to the broader community and legacy titles. The weekend will feature dedicated side events, including brackets for BlazBlue: Central Fiction, Guilty Gear Xrd REV 2, and a special Lethal League Blaze tournament bolstered by a 500 Euro pot bonus.

Registration

Registration and bracket sign-ups are managed through Start.gg and the official Hessen Crash website. Competitors can secure Early Bird and Regular passes before late registration begins, with Weekend and Day passes available for spectators looking to experience the casual setups, community atmosphere, and high-level tournament streams.

battle-of-bc-8.name: Battle of BC 8
battle-of-bc-8.location: Canada Place, 999 Canada Pl, Vancouver, BC V6C 3E1, Canada
battle-of-bc-8.description:
Battle of BC 8 returns to Vancouver as Canada's biggest fighting game event. Widely recognized across the globe as one of the most prestigious premier majors for the Super Smash Bros. franchise, the multiday festival will take place from June 5 through June 7, 2026, at the stunning Vancouver Convention Centre (Canada Place). The event brings together thousands of competitors, creators, and fans right on the downtown waterfront.

While Battle of BC has built its legacy on massive, internationally stacked brackets for both Super Smash Bros. Melee and Ultimate, it has evolved into a true multi-game powerhouse. For traditional fighting game fans, the event features a highly competitive and stacked open bracket for Street Fighter 6, drawing top regional killers and traveling pros looking to claim victory on one of Canada's biggest main stages.

Premier Tournament Lineup

Alongside the flagship Super Smash Bros. events and Street Fighter 6, the competitive roster includes heavy-hitting staples and modern favorites. Attendees will clash in TEKKEN 8, Rivals 2, and Riot's tag-team fighter, 2XKO.

More Than a Tournament

Battle of BC is designed to be a full destination experience. Attendees can take a break from the brackets to enjoy "Play the City" interactive side events, the event's first-ever Trading Card Game open play zones, casual free-play stations, artist alleys, and the Canadian Esports & Gaming Industry Summit (CEGIS). 19+ attendees can also celebrate the 10th anniversary of the event series at the legendary Boat of BC cruise and Sunday Birthday Bash.

Registration

Registration and bracket sign-ups are managed through Start.gg and the official Battle of BC website. Competitors can secure their spots across various tiers, with Ultra Late registration closing on June 1, 2026. General admission passes are available online or at the venue for spectators wishing to experience the live commentators, the vendor floor, and the electrifying main stage.

the-mixup-2026-round-8.name: The MIXUP 2026 - Round 8
the-mixup-2026-round-8.location: Pl. de la Bourse, 69002 Lyon, France
the-mixup-2026-round-8.description:
The MIXUP 2026 - Round 8 returns to France as one of Europe's most prestigious fighting game tournaments. Scheduled for June 13 through June 14, 2026, the event will take place at Espace 140 in Lyon, bringing together top competitors and passionate fans from across the continent and the world.

As a crucial stop on multiple international circuits, the 2026 tournament features an incredibly high stakes lineup. The main stage will be headlined by massive brackets for TEKKEN 8, which serves as a highly coveted TWT Master Event and an Esports World Cup 2026 qualifier, ensuring that global heavyweights will clash for crucial circuit points.

Premier Circuit Qualifiers

The competitive stakes extend well beyond a single title. Attendees will also battle it out in SNK's Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves and The King of Fighters XV, both proudly featured as official Master Tier qualifiers for the SWC 2026. Additionally, Riot Games' tag team fighter 2XKO takes center stage as an official Challenger Tier event in the 2026 Competitive Series.

Community and Legacy Events

The MIXUP is deeply celebrated for its dedication to the vibrant French arcade community. The weekend will feature dedicated LaDOSETV classic arcade action, including brackets for Super Street Fighter II X, Street Fighter III: 3rd Strike, and Garou: Mark of the Wolves, alongside modern favorites like Guilty Gear Strive and Street Fighter 6.

Registration

Registration and bracket sign ups are managed through Start.gg and the official MIXUP website. Competitors can secure their passes before registration closes, with spectator tickets available for those looking to experience the intense matches, classic arcade setups, and the electrifying European crowd.

evo-2026.name: Evo Vegas 2026
evo-2026.location: 300 Convention Center Dr, Las Vegas, NV 89109, USA
evo-2026.description:
Evo 2026 returns to Nevada as the world's most prestigious fighting game tournament. Scheduled for June 26 through June 28, 2026, the event will transform the West Hall of the Las Vegas Convention Center into a three-day celebration of competitive fighting games, bringing together competitors, creators, and gaming communities from across the globe.

As the ultimate destination for the FGC, the 2026 tournament features a high-stakes lineup on the biggest stage. The event is headlined by a massive open bracket for Street Fighter 6, guaranteeing that absolute world-class talent will be in attendance to fight for the highly coveted trophy.

Premier Tournament Lineup

Beyond Street Fighter 6, the historic 12-game competitive roster includes heavy-hitting staples and modern favorites. Attendees will clash in TEKKEN 8, Guilty Gear -Strive-, Riot's 2v2 fighter 2XKO, and SNK's Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves. The main stage also welcomes Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising, Under Night In-Birth II Sys:Celes, Virtua Fighter 5 R.E.V.O. World Stage, and fresh additions like Invincible VS and Rivals of Aether II.

More Than a Tournament

Evo is designed to be a complete destination experience fueled by energy, culture, and real competition. Attendees can take a break from the brackets to enjoy publisher and developer panels, hands-on experiences at developer booths, a sprawling vendor hall, the legendary Artist Alley, and Evo's iconic 300+ cabinet free-play arcade.

Registration

Registration and bracket sign-ups are managed through Start.gg and the official Evo website. Competitors can secure their spots in the tournament until late registration closes on May 25, 2026. General admission passes are available online for spectators wishing to experience the electrifying Arena Finals Experience, the live commentators, exclusive merchandise, and the greatest fighting game stage on earth.
